descriptionText: MCY 70 For Sale 2014|Guest Cabins:3|Crew Cabins:3The MCY 70 For Sale 2014 presents an attractive opportunity for anyone seeking a well‑maintained yacht with strong pedigree and thoughtful design. Built by Monte Carlo Yachts in 2014 and currently located in Hong Kong, this 21‑metre model is known for its balanced combination of comfort, practicality, and contemporary styling. This particular MCY 70 has been kept in good condition, reflecting careful ownership and regular upkeep.Specifications:• Brand: Monte Carlo Yachts • Year: 2014 • Length: 21 m • Max. Beam: 5.45 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.8 m • Location: Hong Kong • Max. Speed: 26 knots • Fuel Tank: 4,000 l • Water Tank: 800 l • Guest Cabins: 3 • Crew: 3 • Engines: 2 x MAN V8 1200HPThe exterior carries the unmistakable Nuvolari Lenard design language, offering clean lines and a profile that remains modern even a decade after launch. One of the standout features of the MCY 70 For Sale 2014 is the focus on usable space. The wide beam of 5.45 metres creates a pleasant sense of openness, especially noticeable on the main deck, where the shaped bulwarks and generous windows allow natural light to flow freely throughout the interior. These design elements contribute to a relaxed onboard atmosphere and help maintain a close connection with the sea.Powered by twin MAN V8 1200HP engines, the yacht delivers a maximum speed of 26 knots. This performance level suits both longer coastal trips and shorter weekend cruising. The 4,000‑litre fuel capacity provides a comfortable range for regional journeys around Asia, and the 800‑litre water tank supports extended stays on board without frequent resupply.Inside, the MCY 70 For Sale 2014 offers three guest cabins, designed to accommodate family or small groups with ease. The layout prioritises practicality, with thoughtful storage solutions and a welcoming ambience. The crew quarters for three allow for smooth operations and a comfortable service experience. As with all Monte Carlo Yachts models, the craftsmanship is visible in the materials, joinery, and attention to detail, giving the interior a warm and inviting feeling without unnecessary extravagance.On deck, the enlarged entertainment areas create pleasant spaces for relaxing, dining, or socialising. The flybridge is particularly appreciated for its seating arrangements and open views, making it a popular spot during warm-weather cruising. Whether used for private family outings or hosting friends, the layout supports a wide variety of activities.In summary, this MCY 70 For Sale 2014 offers a balanced mix of performance, comfort, and thoughtful design. Her good condition, reputable build quality, and well‑planned spaces make her a strong candidate for buyers looking for a dependable yacht in this size category.
descriptionHtml:
MCY 70 For Sale 2014|Guest Cabins:3|Crew Cabins:3

The MCY 70 For Sale 2014 presents an attractive opportunity for anyone seeking a well‑maintained yacht with strong pedigree and thoughtful design. Built by Monte Carlo Yachts in 2014 and currently located in Hong Kong, this 21‑metre model is known for its balanced combination of comfort, practicality, and contemporary styling. This particular MCY 70 has been kept in good condition, reflecting careful ownership and regular upkeep.

Specifications:

• Brand: Monte Carlo Yachts
• Year: 2014
• Length: 21 m
• Max. Beam: 5.45 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.8 m
• Location: Hong Kong
• Max. Speed: 26 knots
• Fuel Tank: 4,000 l
• Water Tank: 800 l
• Guest Cabins: 3
• Crew: 3
• Engines: 2 x MAN V8 1200HP

The exterior carries the unmistakable Nuvolari Lenard design language, offering clean lines and a profile that remains modern even a decade after launch. One of the standout features of the MCY 70 For Sale 2014 is the focus on usable space. The wide beam of 5.45 metres creates a pleasant sense of openness, especially noticeable on the main deck, where the shaped bulwarks and generous windows allow natural light to flow freely throughout the interior. These design elements contribute to a relaxed onboard atmosphere and help maintain a close connection with the sea.

Powered by twin MAN V8 1200HP engines, the yacht delivers a maximum speed of 26 knots. This performance level suits both longer coastal trips and shorter weekend cruising. The 4,000‑litre fuel capacity provides a comfortable range for regional journeys around Asia, and the 800‑litre water tank supports extended stays on board without frequent resupply.

Inside, the MCY 70 For Sale 2014 offers three guest cabins, designed to accommodate family or small groups with ease. The layout prioritises practicality, with thoughtful storage solutions and a welcoming ambience. The crew quarters for three allow for smooth operations and a comfortable service experience. As with all Monte Carlo Yachts models, the craftsmanship is visible in the materials, joinery, and attention to detail, giving the interior a warm and inviting feeling without unnecessary extravagance.

On deck, the enlarged entertainment areas create pleasant spaces for relaxing, dining, or socialising. The flybridge is particularly appreciated for its seating arrangements and open views, making it a popular spot during warm-weather cruising. Whether used for private family outings or hosting friends, the layout supports a wide variety of activities.

In summary, this MCY 70 For Sale 2014 offers a balanced mix of performance, comfort, and thoughtful design. Her good condition, reputable build quality, and well‑planned spaces make her a strong candidate for buyers looking for a dependable yacht in this size category.
